description: A couple adopted a child during the year and wants to claim the adoption tax credit for their expenses.

nodes.task_description: Gather documentation of all qualified adoption expenses (e.g., court costs, attorney fees).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects all relevant receipts and invoices.

nodes.task_description: Verify the total expenses and the year the adoption became final.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms all details needed for the credit.

nodes.task_description: Prepare Form 8839, Qualified Adoption Expenses, to calculate the allowable credit.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately calculates the credit, subject to income limitations.
